name: CFSC Checks Cashed Tompkins
description_short: CFSC Checks Cashed Tompkins offers check cashing without a bank account, plus money transfers, bill pay, and prepaid cards at 112 Tompkins Ave in Brooklyn.
description_long:
CFSC (Community Financial Services) operates a check-cashing location at 112 Tompkins Ave in Brooklyn, NY 11206, serving the Williamsburg neighborhood. The company is part of a larger multi-location network across New York with over a dozen locations in Brooklyn, Queens, and Manhattan. The Tompkins Ave location operates Monday-Friday 7:30 am to 8:00 pm and Saturday 7:30 am to 5:45 pm, closed Sundays.

The Tompkins location provides check cashing without requiring a bank account, using only a government-issued photo ID and basic personal information (name, address, phone, SSN). Beyond check cashing, CFSC offers money orders, electronic bill pay, money transfers to over 80 countries, prepaid debit cards (Yes! Debit Account), ATM access, foreign currency exchange, prepaid cellular services, transit/MetroCard purchases, lottery services, and tax refund cashing. The location also provides business check cashing and EZ Pass services, with bilingual (Spanish) staff support.

The Tompkins location distinguishes itself through extended weekday hours (until 8:00 pm), no credit checks for prepaid debit cards, immediate check clearing (no waiting period), and a one-stop-shop model combining financial services in a single visit. The foreign currency exchange capability serving 80+ countries addresses the neighborhood's immigrant demographics. No monthly fees apply to check cashing services.

As a check-cashing alternative to traditional banking, CFSC serves unbanked and underbanked consumers who need fast cash access without credit requirements. However, check cashing fees are not disclosed on the website, making true cost comparison impossible. The service targets convenience-oriented customers prioritizing speed and accessibility over comprehensive banking features.
pros: No bank account required to cash checks—only government-issued photo ID and basic personal info
Extended weekday hours until 8:00 pm accommodate working customers
One-stop financial hub: check cashing, bill pay, money transfers, prepaid cards, and currency exchange in single location
Foreign currency exchange for 80+ countries serves immigrant and international customer base
No credit check required for Yes! Debit Account prepaid cards
Immediate check clearing—funds available same-day, no waiting period
cons: Check cashing fees not disclosed on website—customers cannot comparison shop without calling
No Sunday hours at Tompkins location, limiting weekend accessibility for some customers
Personal information requirements (SSN, address) create privacy considerations
Prepaid debit cards are not full bank accounts—limited FDIC protections and ATM fee structures
Limited transparency on money transfer fees and foreign exchange rates
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals without traditional bank accounts who need immediate check access
Immigrant populations requiring frequent international money transfers and foreign currency exchange
Shift workers and hourly employees needing extended evening check-cashing hours
Customers paying bills without setting up bank account transfers or online banking
diagnosis: CFSC Tompkins is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need fast check cashing without opening a bank account, particularly immigrants in the Williamsburg area requiring international money transfer and currency exchange services. The main caveat is that check cashing and service fees are not disclosed online, requiring customers to call (347) 425-8368 for pricing before deciding whether this location's rates are competitive.
